deck: Innocent Chiboma of Zambia's Ministry of Health joins Jonathan Jackson to unpack what a whole-of-government approach to digital health really takes, and why it reaches far beyond the health ministry alone.
seo_description: Innocent Chiboma of Zambia's Ministry of Health on a whole-of-government approach to digital health and building coordination across ministries.
og_description: Zambia's Innocent Chiboma on a whole-of-government approach to digital health, from coordination to the private sector.
about: Recorded as a dispatch from the 2022 Global Digital Health Forum, this episode features Jonathan Jackson in conversation with Innocent Chiboma, Principal ICT Officer for Digital Health at the Ministry of Health of Zambia.

Their discussion centers on what a whole-of-government approach to digital health looks like in practice. Chiboma argues that understanding a person's health means looking at everything that concerns them, from sanitation to water to the role of local authorities, which is why digital health cannot live inside the health ministry alone. The conversation explores what it takes to build coordination and collaboration across government ministries and agencies, as well as the private sector.

pull_quote.text: So we should not limit digital health to ministry of health. It's something that will go to all the other government ministries and agencies and may I say including the private sector.
pull_quote.cite: Innocent Chiboma, Ministry of Health of Zambia

bullets: The whole-of-government thesis: why a holistic picture of a person's health pulls in sanitation, water, and local authorities, not just the health ministry
Coordination in practice: what it actually takes to align digital health work across government ministries and agencies
Beyond the public sector: bringing the private sector into the digital health conversation
A view from inside the ministry: Chiboma's perspective as Principal ICT Officer for Digital Health in Zambia
Dispatches from the field: recorded live at the 2022 Global Digital Health Forum

guests.name: Innocent Chiboma
guests.role: Principal ICT Officer for Digital Health, working to coordinate digital health across government ministries and the private sector.
